BoJ hawkish pivot intact (0.75% rate, April 27-28 meeting live for 25bps hike) — 6J remains BULLISH; safe-haven JPY demand from Iran conflict adds further support
Gold falling -2.77% today despite geopolitical risk — dollar strength (DXY +0.47%) and rate hike fears from oil shock creating headwinds; structural bias remains bullish but confidence reduced
